data.name: Chuppy Saves the Day
data.detailed_description:
The chocolate factory blew—now everyone’s covered in sweet chaos. Play Chuppy, a jelly heroine who can morph into a slime cube. Hop across a tile field where enemies only move when you move. Carve safe routes through lasers, spikes, and saw-tracks, clearing chocolate tiles to reveal the candy girl trapped behind them. Stay still and time stands still—it’s puzzle-tactical, not twitch.

Each level ends with a short, playful scene as Chuppy de-cubes and chats with the rescued girl—light, flirty, and sweet. From Dragon Beard to Brigadeiro, Coffee Pudding to Licorice, every rescue is a sugary personality to uncover.

Arcade feel, puzzle heart: simple inputs, tight pacing, no grind. Just 18 handcrafted stages, smart hazards, and a charming gallery to revisit your rescues.

  • Move-when-you-move: Classic step-based puzzle flow. If you wait, everything waits.

  • Hop & reveal: Remove chocolate tiles with each hop to uncover the girl in the background.

  • Sweet dangers: Lasers, spikes, saw rails, and hazardous candies that demand timing and planning.

  • Power-ups: Extra hearts, Stop Time (move while hazards pause), and Invulnerability Star for bold routes.

  • 18 levels: Bite-sized, handcrafted puzzles with a flirty end scene for each rescue.

  • Gallery: Rewatch your rescues and unlocked art.

  • 11 achievements: For clean runs, power-up mastery, and full reveals.

  • Controls for everyone: Keyboard, mouse, controller, and touch. Full Steam Deck support.

  • Settings: Rumble on/off, audio sliders, basic accessibility and comfort options.

data.short_description: Turn-by-turn hop ‘n’ reveal puzzle. Move only when you do, dodge candy hazards, clear chocolate tiles, rescue candy girls, and enjoy flirty conversations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64Bit). or Linux (Steam OS)
  • 處理器: Any Quad-Core Processor (Intel or AMD)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce MX150 / Vega 8 or better with 2GB of Graphics Memory
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
  • 備註: The game is optimized for a wide range of hardware, but a dedicated GPU is recommended for the best experience.
